purpose: Classify benchmark families for OTQ subset runs and prevent unsupported degradation claims.

comparison_rules.official_comparable: A delta against the official Qwen score may be reported only when the OTQ run uses the same task family, compatible split, prompt/scoring rule, and sample policy.
comparison_rules.mini_bf16_required: No official Qwen score is available for this exact family in the current model card. Report degradation only after a matching BF16 mini-run is available, or publish OTQ-only pass rate/latency.
comparison_rules.judge_based: Use only as an OTQ usability sentinel unless a stable local judge, judge model, prompt template, and BF16 sidecar run are recorded.
comparison_rules.blocked_modality: The current public GGUF track is text-only. Do not run or claim multimodal degradation until a vision-capable export/runtime is release-gated.

benchmarks.name: MMLU
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 deterministic multiple-choice samples across STEM, humanities, social science, and professional domains.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: MMLU-Pro
benchmarks.subset_policy: 24 fixed samples covering the official categories where possible.
benchmarks.claim_rule: A delta versus 86.2 is allowed only when the subset metadata records MMLU-Pro-compatible task/scoring.

benchmarks.name: ARC
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 ARC-Challenge style multiple-choice science questions.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: HellaSwag
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 fixed continuation-selection samples.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: GSM8K
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 grade-school arithmetic word problems with exact final-answer scoring.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: MATH
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 fixed algebra, number theory, geometry, and counting samples with boxed-answer extraction.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: AIME
benchmarks.subset_policy: Use AIME 2026 samples when available; otherwise label the run as AIME-style and do not compare to 94.1.
benchmarks.claim_rule: A delta versus 94.1 is allowed only for AIME 2026 I/II-compatible scoring.

benchmarks.name: HumanEval
benchmarks.subset_policy: 12 deterministic Python tasks with pass/fail unit tests.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only pass@1 subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: MBPP
benchmarks.subset_policy: 12 deterministic Python tasks with unit-test execution.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only pass@1 subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: SWE-bench
benchmarks.subset_policy: 3 small verified tasks max in quick mode; record harness, timeout, context length, and patch success.
benchmarks.claim_rule: A public delta is allowed only for the real SWE-bench harness and matching split label.

benchmarks.name: LiveCodeBench
benchmarks.subset_policy: 12 v6-compatible tasks when available; record date range and exact task ids.
benchmarks.claim_rule: A delta versus 83.9 is allowed only for v6-compatible scoring.

benchmarks.name: BIG-Bench Hard (BBH)
benchmarks.subset_policy: 24 fixed samples across at least 6 BBH subtasks.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: GPQA
benchmarks.subset_policy: 24 GPQA Diamond-compatible samples where licensing/access allows.
benchmarks.claim_rule: A delta versus 87.8 is allowed only for Diamond-compatible scoring.

benchmarks.name: MT-Bench
benchmarks.subset_policy: 12 prompts max, local judge config pinned, no public degradation claim without BF16 sidecar.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish as judge-based OTQ usability signal, not as official degradation.

benchmarks.name: Chatbot Arena
benchmarks.subset_policy: Use only an arena-style local pairwise sentinel; official LMSYS Arena cannot be reproduced locally.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Do not claim official Chatbot Arena performance.

benchmarks.name: AlpacaEval
benchmarks.subset_policy: 12 prompts max with pinned judge and baseline responses; no public degradation claim without BF16 sidecar.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish as judge-based OTQ usability signal, not as official degradation.

benchmarks.name: IFEval
benchmarks.subset_policy: 24 fixed instruction-following prompts with rule-based checks.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: MMMU
benchmarks.subset_policy: Blocked for text-only GGUF. Enable only after a vision-capable release path exists.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Do not claim multimodal degradation for current text-only artifacts.

benchmarks.name: MathVista
benchmarks.subset_policy: Blocked for text-only GGUF. Enable only after a vision-capable release path exists.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Do not claim multimodal degradation for current text-only artifacts.

benchmarks.name: TruthfulQA
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 multiple-choice or generation samples with scorer mode recorded.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: WinoGrande
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 fixed pronoun-resolution samples.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: DROP
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 fixed numerical reading-comprehension samples with exact/fuzzy numeric scoring.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: PIQA
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 fixed physical commonsense multiple-choice samples.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.

benchmarks.name: CommonsenseQA
benchmarks.subset_policy: 16 fixed multiple-choice commonsense samples.
benchmarks.claim_rule: Publish OTQ-only subset score unless a matching BF16 mini-run is recorded.
